draft_prompts.planner: Develop a detailed plan to replicate the APT: Adaptive Pruning and Tuning Pretrained Language Models for Efficient Training and Inference research paper, including task decomposition and resource allocation.
draft_prompts.experiment_designer: Create a set of experiments to replicate the Adaptive Pruning method, including experiment design, parameter tuning, and evaluation metrics.
draft_prompts.code_generator: Write research-grade code to implement the Adaptive Pruning method, including LoRA setup and baseline implementation, using available pre-trained models and datasets.
draft_prompts.tester: Implement test cases to validate the Adaptive Pruning method's implementation, including evaluation of LoRA setup and baseline models' performance.
